'''Short haul freighter''{{'s}} were space [[Transport/Legends|transports]] capable of carrying cargo or passengers. They were capable of only a limited number of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jumps between refuelings. [[Reymet Autem]] and [[Riao Siao]] fled [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to [[Felacat]].

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 48|''Republic'' 48]] {{1st}}

[[Category:Freighter classes]]
